title: Peppery Tender Australian Almond Bowl
description: A vibrant, pepper‑laden bowl featuring tandoor‑roasted chickpeas, tender quinoa, crisp greens, and a crunchy ground almond topping for an energising Australian twist.
instructions: Preheat your tandoor or oven to 200 °C (390 °F).
Toss the chickpeas with 1 tsp olive oil, 1 tsp tandoori spice mix, and a pinch of salt; spread them on a baking sheet.
Roast the chickpeas in the tandoor for 15 minutes, turning once, until golden and slightly crispy.
While the chickpeas roast, rinse the quinoa and cook it according to package instructions (about 15 minutes).
Peel and slice the avocado, dice the bell pepper, and prep spinach, carrots, and cucumber.
Transfer cooked quinoa to a large bowl; top with roasted chickpeas, avocado, bell pepper, spinach, carrots, and cucumber.
Squeeze lemon juice over the bowl, drizzle with coconut yogurt, and season with a pinch of extra tandoori mix if desired.
Sprinkle ground almonds evenly over the bowl for crunch and a nutty finish.
Gently toss all ingredients together to combine flavours.
Serve immediately, enjoying the peppery zest and tender textures.
